creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rene
Date: Mon Jan  6 11:26:04 2014
New Revision: 338862
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/338862

Log:
  Outdated and depends on expired games/warsow-data, schedule for removal
  on 2014-01-22
  
  PR:		ports/185116
  Submitted by:	rene
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (acm, 15 days)

Modified:
  head/games/linux-warsow/Makefile

Modified: head/games/linux-warsow/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/linux-warsow/Makefile	Mon Jan  6 11:25:05 2014	(r338861)
+++ head/games/linux-warsow/Makefile	Mon Jan  6 11:26:04 2014	(r338862)
@@ -23,6 +23,9 @@ COMMENT=	Free multiplayer first person s
 
 IGNORE=		is outdated, does not match games/warsow-data port
 
+DEPRECATED=	depends on expired games/warsow-data
+EXPIRATION_DATE=2014-01-22
+
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${DATADIR}/data0.pk3:${PORTSDIR}/games/warsow-data
 
 USE_LINUX=	yes
